# thoth_evidence_verify (Data Source)

Verifies governance evidence WORM chain integrity for the tenant.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of chain records to verify.

### Read-Only

- `breach_detail` (String) Verification failure detail when verified is false.
- `chain_head` (Number) Highest verified chain index.
- `records_checked` (Number) Number of records evaluated by verification.
- `response_json` (String) Full verification response payload as JSON.
- `verified` (Boolean) Whether chain verification succeeded.
